title: Muse on Fame
notes:
fl is an aspiring actress but her career hasn't taken off so she has to work as a part time cleaner
her college sweetheart is a director and is working with her hubae who's now a famous actress and has always been jealous of her so tries to homewreck
she stumbles into a posthumous photography exhibit where she's the subject in all the photos, taken from when she used to be a young and happy up-and-comer. the photographer took them all secretly but an agency convinces her to pretend she was good friends w him
she becomes rly successful and her hubae booms her career after problems w alcohol and then eventually kills herself
at the end, it turns out her manager's brother was the photographer and his sister in law is the ceo of the agency
the ceo reveals in another exhibit that the whole story was a lie and her husband was obssessed w beauty bc he was born disfigured on one eye and eventually died young to a genetic disease
the brother found all his secret photos and journal hidden in the ceiling during a suicide attempt and she found out that he never really loved her
their mother was a famous actress and the movie she starred in is the fl and manager's fav and they both star in the remake before he dies of his disease

title: Betrayal of Dignity
notes:
chloe verdier is the daughter of a count and has a bad leg because of a childhood illness so she has to walk w a cane
the duke takes shelter in the count's region during the war w his men and she helps tend to the injured
after the war the count is in financial trouble and needs to marry off her sister but she runs away w her lover who they think is a bum but turns out to be the king of the neighboring country
she's framed for poisoning his rumored lover - it's a plot by the royal family and scumbag prince but he saw her coming back from staying the night at her childhood friend's place in the stables so he plants the evidence in her room instead so he can save her after
she finds out he orchestrated everything since they first met (her father's bankruptcy, her murder accusation) through a safe in his office
chloe who was pregnant catches an illness but refuses to take medicine cause it'll harm the baby, but damian feeds it to her and she miscarries
he wouldn't let her leave so she fakes her death in a burning cabin and starts a new life as a family's governess in a small town far away

title: From Knight To Lady
notes:
surprisingly refreshing artist and writing
great character depth and subtle visual symbolism, although the main romance is a bit boring, the rest of the plot makes up for it
ersha's commander estelle is betrayed by her close friend and second in command khalid, and they lose the war
she wakes up 3 years later as lucifella, who threw herself into the icy lake after being spurned by the toxic crown prince temir
she and duke heint are engaged by her father's plan, but he's the enemy commander who killed all her comrades, though they eventually fall in love
khalid wanted to protect her from the truth that she was being used and sacrificed, and since she was being sent to die anyway he couldn't think of any other way

rly poor girl takes care of four small children that her older gambling addict brother keeps picking up
one day she gets picked up off the street and contract marries soichiro bc he has to get married to inherit his granpa's company
initially he's tryna set her up w his friend nozoku who is like a prince to her
ml turns out to just be tsundere and his friend turns out to be a huge yandere obssessed with her
she turns out to be his sister, which they tease rly heavily early on

title: I Became The Hero's Rival
notes:
complete but should have dropped
everyone loves mc who's like a hamster, especially claudia (fl of the original novel) and her brother felix
then the brother suddenly gets a demon put into him by the three original novel mls (the crown prince, duke, and priest) and loses part of his soul
he leaves to protect the mc and disappears and then reappears as a different person who's now a war hero and the demon ate his feelings
turns from pale skin white hair w glasses to tan black hair dude rofl

title: I'm The Male Lead's Ex
notes:
everyone just loves erica, it's almost a reverse harem but they really push her with the magic tower grand mage zionne while the original ml and fl r just sidelined and barely have any screentime
zionne has a diary that his future self sent to him, then saved the crown prince from being poisoned and disguises him as his sister juliana and sends him to work as erica's maid
idk the art is inconsistent and they keep adding frivolous plot points that really don't go anywhere

title: Rta 24h Record With One Day Left I'll Break All The Death Flags
Second Life Of A Trash Princess
notes:
man, the story is really carried by the art, which is not that consistent in the first place
everyone princess legina knows is killed by her fiance herman and his 'paramour' sorcerer annette who led a revolt
annette can use hypnosis magic and is actually lady evaldine, a witch/mage who was betrayed by the first emperor after he used her to climb to his position so she wants to get revenge by killing his entire bloodline
but legina uses an ancient necklace by sacrificing her life to make a wish to save her younger brother who was a spoiled brat but who she loved
she goes back in time and tries to act like a bigger brat than him but really she doesn't, her personality just changes and she becomes more outspoken
her dad hated and kept turning her away for her entire childhood bc he wasn't allowed to see the empress on her deathbed after giving birth to theore but suddenly he's chasing after her in this one?
the ml is so bland, he's just a pretty face with no personality
started strong and she began as an itachi like char but really didn't go anywhere

title: Stairway Of Time
notes: skimmed

title: That Wasn't My Plan
notes:
she was bullied in her first life as a manager of the big name actor siyun and dies after getting struck by a car
she finds herself back in time with a younger siyun before he debuted and his personality is way different, shy and respectful
she decides to get revenge and sabotage his career so he never becomes famous in this life
but then she realizes he turned out that way because of the constant stalkers and paparazzi, and he mistakenly thought she was one of them
in this life, that bond and end up liking each other, but when he confesses, his previous life memories suddenly flood his mind and he apologizes profusely

title: The Blood Of Madame Giselle
notes:
wtf was that ending
giselle kills isaac cause he was the killer

title: The Price Of Breaking Up
notes:
very average, beginning and middle were enjoyable and art was decent
plot is predictable and shallow, kinda the same premise as remarried empress, except mc is very much a mary sue
ml is rly pretty and kept me guessing if he was a yandere villain at first but then turned out to just be just a boring green flag
sia is engaged to the crown prince since childhood bc she has pink hair and is the chosen one from the prophecy so the royal family claims her
emperor is cartoon evil and doesn't let her leave the palace except once a year to see her family and gives her a ton of work
when she's older the temple announces that she's not the lady of the prophecy and this other pink haired girl is so the crown prince breaks if off with her and then goes through the whole sovieshu imprison her in the palace and then regret it and be jealous and grovel for the rest of the story
ml is the pope and met mc in childhood and fell in love cause she saved him from the other priest kids who were bullying him
ending was exceptionally boring and a crawl to get through

title: The Red Knight Needs No Reward
notes:
nice art and had promising plot points but they really disneyfied everything which made it kind of sickenly sweet boring and unbearable
didn't explore any angst or trauma more than just mentioning it and then resolving it with 'oh well that was the old silly me'
judith was a rogue turned black knight who only cared about money bc of debt, assassinated a bunch of people for her captain jeromell who stabbed her to silence her after she killed the third prince
she got the stigma of time which brought her back to the selection exam and she chose the red knights instead, where she and the captain immediately fall in love
and then there's no buildup or prep for anything, just all the events start happening earlier and they get through it with sheer willpower
and suddenly she's rich and the hero of the empire
like... everything is just too easy

title: The Second Male Lead Is A Girl
notes:
ml enok is hella annoying sadist puppy yandere the artist changes halfway through
a girl is reborn as a side character in a novel who turns out to be the daughter of duke estella. rosa is found by her father the duke who can't have any more children and doesnt have a successor and made to live as a male using magical devices (a ring)
she befriends the original villainess (vivian) and mc (crown prince theodore) who all three become close friends, and both of them fall in love w her
her dad turns out to be alive and working with the church to get revenge on the royal family by.... casting an ice meteor spell to destroy the empire
